creator: pawel@FreeBSD.org
text:
There are some QA problems detected by ports framework:

====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
Error: /usr/local/bin/ss-local is linked to /usr/local/lib/libcrypto.so.8 from security/openssl but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need USE_OPENSSL=yes
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: man/man1/ss-nat.1.gz
Error: Orphaned: man/man1/ss-redir.1.gz
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
===> Error: Plist issues found.
*** Error code 1
